speaker: speaker1
text: Dave , there's something I want to talk to you about .

speaker: speaker1
text: I've been talking to WebTracker . I'm thinking of jumping ship .

speaker: speaker2
text: What ? Are you serious ? You'd defect to our archrival ! ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Keep your voice down . We'll talk more later . Right now I need to see Vince .

speaker: speaker2
text: We definitely have to talk , Zina . And watch your back . Elvin is still mad about his nose .

speaker: speaker1
text: OK , but don't tell anyone what I said .
